title: POST /books — Create a new book
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:26-31 implements POST endpoint; src/books/db.clj:20-28 implements create-book!

title: GET /books — List all books with author filter
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:33-36 implements GET /books with author parameter; src/books/db.clj:30-39 implements list-books with optional author filter

title: GET /books/{id} — Get single book by ID
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:38-41 implements GET /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:41-44 implements get-book function

title: PUT /books/{id} — Update a book
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:43-51 implements PUT /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:46-50 implements update-book! function

title: DELETE /books/{id} — Delete a book
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:53-56 implements DELETE /books/:id endpoint; src/books/db.clj:52-57 implements delete-book! function

title: Store data in SQLite
evidence: src/books/db.clj:5 defines SQLite dbtype; deps.edn:8 includes org.xerial/sqlite-jdbc dependency; src/books/db.clj:10-18 creates books table

title: Return JSON responses with appropriate HTTP status codes
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:10-13 defines json-response helper; endpoints return 200/201/400/404 status codes; cheshire handles JSON serialization

title: Input validation (title and author required)
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:15-20 validates title and author; tests verify 400 response for missing fields at test/books/handler_test.clj:50-68

title: Health check endpoint GET /health
evidence: src/books/handler.clj:23-24 implements health check; test/books/handler_test.clj:27-32 verifies endpoint

title: Working source code in workspace directory
evidence: src/books/core.clj, src/books/handler.clj, src/books/db.clj implement complete API

title: README.md with setup and run instructions
evidence: README.md:10-29 documents setup, run commands, and port configuration; includes example curl commands

title: At least 3 unit/integration tests
evidence: test/books/handler_test.clj contains 6 deftest blocks with 25 assertions across all API endpoints
